text:
This allowed PDE records 
that had the same prescriber but used a combination of different identifiers to be assigned the same 
identifier in the CCW file. We assigned CCW_PRSCRBR_IDs on an annual basis for the universe of 
prescribers found in the annual PDE data. 

For current years (i.e., after May 2013), a national provider identifier (NPI) will typically be associated 
with a single.HCID.
